explanation: This command simulates a benign use of msedge_proxy.exe to download a file from an HTTP URL, matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses the long-form option '--url' instead of '-u', demonstrating substitution as a mutation technique while still matching the Sigma rule.
This command adds an output path argument, which is optional and does not affect the detection criteria of the Sigma rule.
This command uses insertion of extra spaces after the URL, which is still parsed correctly and matches the Sigma rule.
This command uses quotes around the URL, demonstrating insertion of quotes as a mutation technique while still matching the Sigma rule.
